overview.description: The LHA Risk-Managed Income ETF (RMIF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that provides diversified coverage of fixed-income securities. The fund seeks current income and capital preservation by using proprietary analysis and a discretionary allocation approach. RMIF was launched on Jun 9, 2023 and is issued by Little Harbor Advisors.
